title: tilia sylvestris subsp. intermedia
intro: Tilia sylvestris subsp. intermedia, also known as the small-leaved lime or intermediate lime, is a subspecies of the Tilia sylvestris tree, a deciduous tree native to Europe and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Tilia sylvestris subsp. intermedia include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Tilia sylvestris subsp. intermedia is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds.
